title: Knysna taxi driver's family seeks answers ahead of trial
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The family of Ricardo de Vos...
bodyText: [{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sergeant Chris Spies, Southern Cape police spokesperson, confirmed that three men, aged 26, 29 and 31, were arrested on murder charges the morning after the killing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"My brother's face was deformed and restructured as a result of a brick the suspects allegedly threw at his head, causing a fractured skull. I had to prepare him for his funeral - a sight I will never forget. He was hardly recognisable, and our family could not even pay our last respects with an open casket.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna taxi driver's family seeks answers ahead of trial
